tool_input.command: cat /home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work4/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge/component/libraries/libraries-date.json | python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(f's{i+1}: {s[\"title\"][:80]}') for i,s in enumerate(data.get('sections',[]))]"

jq -r --arg sec "s11" '
  . as $root |
  ([.sections[]? | select(.id == $sec)][0]) as $s |
  if $s == null then "SECTION_NOT_FOUND"
  else "# " + $root.title + " > " + $s.title + "\n" + $s.content
  end
' /home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work4/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge/development-tools/testing-framework/testing-framework-03-Tips.json
